description: The churn dataset relates to telephony account features and usage, aiming to determine whether a customer has churned. It is sourced from PMLB and BigML, and was originally used in the book 'Discovering Knowledge in Data: An Introduction to Data Mining'.

attribute_introduction.state: The state in which the customer resides.
attribute_introduction.account_length: The duration of the customer's account in days.
attribute_introduction.area_code: The area code associated with the customer's phone number.
attribute_introduction.international_plan: Indicates if the customer has an international calling plan.
attribute_introduction.voice_mail_plan: Indicates if the customer has a voice mail plan.
attribute_introduction.number_vmail_messages: The number of voice mail messages the customer has.
attribute_introduction.total_day_minutes: Total minutes of calls made during the day.
attribute_introduction.total_day_calls: Total number of calls made during the day.
attribute_introduction.total_day_charge: Total charge for calls made during the day.
attribute_introduction.total_eve_minutes: Total minutes of calls made during the evening.
attribute_introduction.total_eve_calls: Total number of calls made during the evening.
attribute_introduction.total_eve_charge: Total charge for calls made during the evening.
attribute_introduction.total_night_minutes: Total minutes of calls made during the night.
attribute_introduction.total_night_calls: Total number of calls made during the night.
attribute_introduction.total_night_charge: Total charge for calls made during the night.
attribute_introduction.total_intl_minutes: Total minutes of international calls made.
attribute_introduction.total_intl_calls: Total number of international calls made.
attribute_introduction.total_intl_charge: Total charge for international calls made.
attribute_introduction.number_customer_service_calls: The number of calls made to customer service.
attribute_introduction.class: The target feature indicating whether the customer churned.
